title: Two CatBoost seeds as averaged correction
summary: Average two CatBoost seeds before applying the low-weight correction to the RealMLP core.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Train a second CatBoost expert with the same folds and parameters except random seed. Set catboost_core = mean(catboost_seed_A, catboost_seed_B), then blend it with the RealMLP core using the parent CatBoost weight or 0.10 if the parent weight is implicit.
expected_effect: Reduce CatBoost correction variance while preserving its complementary signal.
risk: Two CatBoost models add cost and may remain highly correlated.
